defs: An opposite or opposing view; opposition; a posture in which two persons front each other.
quotes: Within the gates of hell sat Death and Sin, In counterview.
M. Peisse has ably advocated the counterview in his preface and appendix.

defs: A position in which two dissimilar things illustrate each other by opposition; contrast.
quotes: I have drawn some lines of Linger's character, on purpose to place it in counterview, or contrast with that of the other company.
